query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A view through a rain-covered windshield showing dark tree silhouettes and scattered points of illumination in the lower portion of the frame, beneath a vast expanse of overcast gray sky. Water droplets and vertical streaks are visible on the glass, with dark foliage and lights seen beyond through heavy rainfall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-detail photograph taken through a rain-covered windshield, showing dark tree silhouettes and scattered lights beneath a flat, oppressive gray sky. Subjects are rendered with smeared, mushy textures in muted, desaturated, washed-out tones, while crushed midtones and weak separation between light and dark produce a low-contrast, suffocating atmosphere that evokes distress and gloom.
